intro: The clearest split is that Agora uses a freemium model and Ably uses a subscription model. Agora is Real-time audio, video, and interactive live streaming SDK with global SD-RTN network infrastructure; Ably is Real-time messaging infrastructure with pub/sub, presence, and 99.999% uptime SLA across global PoPs. The data points Agora at chat applications and live collaboration features, and Ably at chat applications and live collaboration features. Pricing: Agora is freemium, free tier; Ably is subscription from $29 / month. Lock-in is low for Agora and low for Ably, with DX at 5/5 vs 5/5 and transparency at 4/5 vs 4/5. On listed strengths, Agora emphasises chat applications and live collaboration features, and Ably emphasises chat applications and live collaboration features. Both offer an enterprise tier for larger rollouts. Honest trade-off: neither fits static projects, so if that is your context, look elsewhere; otherwise pick on the pivotal factor above and the DX score that matters most to your team.
quick_take: Agora is for chat applications; Ably is for chat applications; decide based on which pricing model fits your budget.
verdict_a: Choose Agora if a freemium pricing model fits your procurement and your workload matches chat applications. Skip it if your context is static projects.
verdict_b: Choose Ably if a subscription pricing model fits your procurement and your workload matches chat applications. Skip it if your context is static projects.

faq.a: Entry pricing is listed as unknown for Agora and $29 / month for Ably. Both offer a free tier for getting started. Total cost at scale depends on usage and plan details that are not in this dataset, so confirm with each vendor.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Agora to Ably?
faq.a: Agora is tagged with low lock-in (proprietary sd-rtn network and signaling; switching requires rewrite). Ably is tagged with low lock-in (proprietary pub/sub protocol and presence model). Both sides are low lock-in, so a migration is feasible but still needs planning around data export and SDK rewrites.

faq.q: Which has better developer experience, Agora or Ably?
faq.a: Both are rated 5/5 for developer experience in this dataset. With equal scores, the choice comes down to the specific SDK surface and docs you will use day to day. Run a short spike on each before deciding.

faq.q: Is Ably a good alternative to Agora?
faq.a: Yes for teams whose workload matches chat applications, since both list the same fit. Ably is flagged as not for static projects, so confirm your context does not fall there.
